description: As a business intelligence analyst at a DVD rental company, you need to set up a complete analytics layer on the Sakila database (host: localhost, user: ga, password: password123). Create a view named v_film_revenue_by_store in the sakila schema that shows each film's rental count and total payment revenue broken down by store, including columns film_id, film_title, store_id, rental_count, and total_revenue. Create a view named v_customer_lifetime_value in the sakila schema that shows each customer's total payments and rental activity, including columns customer_id, customer_name, rental_count, total_spent, and avg_payment. Create a MySQL user 'reporter'@'localhost' with password 'Report2024!' and grant SELECT privilege on both views to this user. Export the full contents of v_customer_lifetime_value to /home/ga/Documents/exports/customer_lifetime_value.csv.
